---
title: "Slides"
---

The slide deck is being developed week by week. Each deck is a Quarto Reveal.js presentation and can be opened directly in a browser after rendering.

| Week | Topic | Slides |
|---:|---|---|
| - | Reusable slide patterns | [Template deck](template.html) |
| 1 | Introduction to imaging as a mathematical problem | [HTML deck](week-01-image-formation.html) |
| 2 | Convolution and blur | [HTML deck](week-02-convolution-blur.html) |
| 3 | Fourier transform in imaging | [HTML deck](week-03-fourier-imaging.html) |
| 4 | Noise models and likelihoods | [HTML deck](week-04-noise-likelihood.html) |
| 5 | Ill-posed inverse problems | [HTML deck](week-05-ill-posed-inverse-problems.html) |
| 6 | Tikhonov regularization | [HTML deck](week-06-tikhonov-regularization.html) |
| 7 | Variational formulation | [HTML deck](week-07-variational-formulation.html) |
| 8 | Total Variation regularization | [HTML deck](week-08-total-variation.html) |
| 9 | Optimization methods | [HTML deck](week-09-optimization-methods.html) |
